scope: Windows and macOS Microsoft PowerPoint render evidence and shared pixel-baseline decision

windows_office.reason: PowerPoint displayed Unlicensed Product and a sign-in-to-start-using-PowerPoint gate before opening the governed deck. No PNG export was performed.

macos_office.reason: No macOS host with Microsoft PowerPoint is attached to this workspace.

decision.recommended_ci_policy: keep shared Office pixel baseline disabled

covered: host OS attestation rejects macOS receipts on win32
receipt manifest is recomputed from contiguous per-slide PNG hashes
PowerPoint licensing and Noto Sans TC installation must be attested
two unique run IDs are required per platform
same PPTX SHA-256, slide count, and dimensions are required
stable cross-platform mismatch selects per-platform baselines
exact stable cross-platform hashes produce only a human-review candidate

slidev_regression: 10/10 existing browser baselines PASS at 0.000% pixel difference
cannot_claim: Windows Microsoft PowerPoint rendered the deck
macOS Microsoft PowerPoint rendered the deck
Windows and macOS Office pixels are equal or different
a shared or per-platform Office baseline is approved
operator identity or PowerPoint license authenticity beyond the observed sign-in gate
receipt authenticity: every field is fabricatable by a direct writer
